toggleDeathScreenUI.title: Death Screen: Settings
toggleDeathScreenUI.desc: Show or hide the Death Screen settings window

toggleDeathScreenEnabled.title: Death Screen: On/Off
toggleDeathScreenEnabled.desc: Turn the death screen on or off (shows a quick toast)

testDeathScreen.title: Death Screen: Test
testDeathScreen.desc: Manually trigger the blackout to preview / tune it

testDeathScreenBlur.title: Death Screen: Test Blur
testDeathScreenBlur.desc: Manually trigger the experimental crash blur to preview it
